active.description: Indicates if the administrator is active and authorized

Ad.title: Ad
Ad.description: An advertisement displayed in the application sidebars

title.description: Title or name of the advertisement

imageUrl.description: Base64 data URI or web URL of the ad image

storagePath.description: Optional Cloud Storage path for the image asset

destinationUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to when they click the ad

position.description: Position in the layout where the ad is displayed

active.description: Whether the ad is currently active and should be displayed

startDate.description: The date when the ad should start being shown

endDate.description: The optional date when the ad should stop being shown

admins/{uid}.description: Administrators who have authorization to manage configurations and ads

ads/{adId}.description: Advertisements managed by administrators and displayed to users
